shortlist.name: Amazfit Helio Strap
shortlist.specs_summary: Screenless wristband 20g, HRV 24/7, HR continuo, SpO2, skin temp, VO2max, 5ATM, 10gg batteria, 50+ sport, HYROX mode, Zepp app iOS + Apple Health sync, no abbonamento
shortlist.notes: Miglior rapporto qualita/prezzo. HRV notturno allineato a WHOOP. App Zepp in beta. Auto workout detection inaffidabile.

shortlist.name: Google Fitbit Air
shortlist.specs_summary: Pebble screenless 12g, HRV overnight 3h, HR continuo, SpO2, skin temp, AFib FDA, VO2max, 5ATM, 7gg batteria, AI coaching
shortlist.notes: Ultraleggero. HRV solo overnight. NO Apple Health write nativo. Sampling rate PPG inferiore.

shortlist.name: WHOOP 5.0 (One Annual)
shortlist.specs_summary: Screenless wristband 26.5g, HRV 24/7 best-in-class, HR 26Hz, SpO2, skin temp, respiratory rate, VO2max, IP68 10m, 14+gg batteria, strain/recovery coaching
shortlist.notes: ABBONAMENTO OBBLIGATORIO €199/anno. Leader HRV/recovery per CrossFit. Bicep mounting disponibile. API REST ufficiale.

shortlist.name: Fitbit Charge 6
shortlist.specs_summary: Band AMOLED 1.04 pollici 30g, HR ML, ECG, EDA stress, HRV overnight, SpO2, VO2max GPS, 5ATM, 7gg batteria, Google Maps/Wallet, 40+ sport
shortlist.notes: Prezzo piu basso. Ha schermo e GPS. ECG unico nella fascia. NO Apple Health nativo. Fine ciclo vita.

shortlist.name: Garmin Vivosmart 6 (atteso)
shortlist.specs_summary: Band AMOLED (leak), HRV Status atteso, HR continuo, SpO2, VO2max, GPS integrato, Body Battery, Sleep Coach, 5ATM atteso, 7+gg batteria attesa, 30+ sport, Garmin Connect API aperta
shortlist.notes: NON ANCORA DISPONIBILE. Spec da leak. Se confermato HRV Status, migliore per export dati (Garmin API aperta).

eliminated.name: Huawei Band 9
eliminated.reason: NO HRV esposto, NO Apple Health sync

eliminated.name: Huawei Band 8
eliminated.reason: NO HRV, NO Apple Health sync

eliminated.name: Garmin Vivosmart 5
eliminated.reason: HRV NON esposto come metrica utente
